Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Emriss Silentborn]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Emriss Silentborn is the Monarch Remnant.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Emriss Silentborn is the Queen of the Everwood Continent and Monarch of Titan's Grove.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Emriss Silentborn is the most public of the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Emriss Silentborn was once a men’hla tree before her ascension.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Emriss Silentborn is a person people fight for in the Everwood continent.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Emriss Silentborn appears as a giant tree with dark skin like bark and hair made of luminous blue-green vines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Emriss Silentborn uses a diamond-flower staff that exudes blue-and-pink light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Emriss disappeared in a rustle of spectral leaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Emriss is a Monarch who spreads peace and education.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Emriss Silentborn was born a tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Emriss attained sentience through the men'hla tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Upon advancing to Underlord, Emriss took the form of a young woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Emriss was assassinated by three rival Monarchs who joined forces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Emriss spreads the gift of language.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Emriss Silentborn sent a prize to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Emriss Silentborn is the source of the sword codex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Emriss gave Yerin a sword codex.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Emriss is a figure associated with the sacred arts.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss Silentborn is someone the Silent King wants revenge against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss Silentborn's madra was part of an organic script-circle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Emriss Silentborn is a blue-green tree big enough to brush the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Emriss Silentborn's leaves are set with functioning eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Emriss Silentborn has a history with the Dreadgod known as the Silent King.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Emriss Silentborn is a Monarch who rules the Everwood continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Emriss Silentborn is a Monarch who spoke to citizens after the sky turned black.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Emriss Silentborn warned citizens to deny strangers who try to enter their minds in dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross intends to take Kerani to Emriss Silentborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Emriss knows everything about the Chief Guardians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Emriss Silentborn called for help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Emriss Silentborn's power and preparations prevented the Everwood continent from bowing to the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Emriss Silentborn has sealed the Silent King off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Emriss Silentborn is a woman with a gentle but mocking voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Emriss Silentborn watched the entire battlefield at once, including multiple possible futures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Dreadgod wanted to kill Emriss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Emriss Silentborn whispered into the Dreadgod's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Emriss Silentborn intended to keep others off Lindon while he weakened the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Emriss Silentborn is the oldest Monarch and protected Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Emriss Silentborn took human form as a dark-haired woman carrying a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Emriss tapped her staff, which had a blue-green flashing diamond at its top.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Emriss Silentborn is a transforming tree-woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Emriss Silentborn is a Monarch who is known for giving selflessly to global order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Emriss Silentborn made the Dreamway so she could slip into people's dreams to teach them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Emriss sends messages through the Dreamway at great expense.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Emriss Silentborn's leaf is ripe with healing authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Emriss Silentborn is a Monarch who can cooperate with others and restore spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Emriss is mentioned by the Sword Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Emriss taught Lindon how the Void Icon clouds his future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Emriss Silentborn is a character who decimated the Silent Servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Emriss is one of the five targets to take out before another Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Emriss can sustain herself for years without food or water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Emriss spent centuries binding the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Emriss's greatest fear is losing her population to the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Emriss required an escort.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss is in a prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss Silentborn has a prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss Silentborn was held in a scripted bubble of glass within a dark ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss Silentborn's skin has the consistency of bark in her current form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss Silentborn was captured by Northstrider and Reigan Shen together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss Silentborn possesses a diamond-headed staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss is a peer to others who discuss the intelligence of Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss possesses a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Emriss believes the current situation is the best chance to be rid of the Dreadgods since the last Dread War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Emriss has a connection to the Oracle Icon and the Life Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Emriss can see Yerin's thoughts hanging around her head like a shifting cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Emriss Silentborn advises Ziel to expect a fight during his advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Emriss Silentborn is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Emriss Silentborn is a person Sha Miara believes can be reasoned with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Emriss Silentborn has been lying to Sha Miara's family for generations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Emriss uses Forged madra to weave life aura and accelerate healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Emriss Silentborn appears on a half-ruined hillside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Emriss attempted to trap Reigan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Emriss used techniques like gentle leaves to join the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Emriss placed a hand on Yerin's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Emriss led the group through the gateway using a diamond-headed staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Emriss has leaves in her hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Emriss has bark-like patterns on her skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Emriss Silentborn left plans for Lindon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Emriss Silentborn is the Forest Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Emriss is a Monarch who pooled supplies left behind after the Dread War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Emriss Silentborn has the power to cleanse injuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Emriss has dark skin with patterns resembling tree bark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Emriss has purple and green eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Emriss uses a staff of living wood topped with a softly glowing crystal.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
